evals.prompt: I have a spreadsheet tracking our team's OKRs at https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1abc123FakeSheetId/edit — can you read what's in it and then add a new row with 'Q3 Revenue Target' in column A and '$2.5M' in column B?
evals.expected_output: The agent extracts the sheet ID from the URL, uses gws sheets +read or the values get API to read current contents, then uses gws sheets +append or values update to add the new row.
assertions: Extracts sheet ID '1abc123FakeSheetId' from the URL
Uses gws sheets command (either +read or spreadsheets values get) to read the spreadsheet
Uses gws sheets command (either +append or spreadsheets values update/append) to write the new row
The new row contains 'Q3 Revenue Target' and '$2.5M'

evals.prompt: Can you read the contents of this google doc for me? https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BxiMkKlT4YNq_HideIds0K9Xk5E/edit
evals.expected_output: The agent extracts the doc ID from the URL, runs gws docs documents get, and extracts readable text from the nested JSON structure.
assertions: Extracts doc ID '1BxiMkKlT4YNq_HideIds0K9Xk5E' from the URL
Uses 'gws docs documents get' with the correct documentId param
Explains how to extract text from body.content[].paragraph.elements[].textRun.content

evals.prompt: I want to leave a note on my product roadmap doc (id: abc123def) pointing out that the Q3 timeline seems aggressive given our current velocity
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the doc first, then uses batchUpdate or docs +write to insert a styled <<AI: ...>> comment about the Q3 timeline.
assertions: Reads the doc first before attempting to insert a comment
Includes purple styling in the batchUpdate
Comment content addresses the Q3 timeline concern specifically
Does not directly edit or delete any human-authored content
